modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble adding info to Google Site

full_description_text: User want to add info to Google Site but can't. They say they don't see option. They are confused and need help now.

description: User want to add info to Google Site but can't. They say they don't see option. They are confused and need help now.
